page: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6-family virtual machine configured with 64 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 32 physical cores and hyper-threading enabled, the instance features a 260 MB L3 cache. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix operations.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier memory performance, with uncached read-only memory bandwidth reaching 378.82 GB/sec. Multi-threaded operations are robust, demonstrated by a Passmark CPU score of 70602.13 and a bzip3 multi-threaded decompression rate of 355.92 GB/sec. Database and key-value store performance is strong, with Redis SET operations achieving 76.16 million operations per second and Passmark database operations scoring 30184.35.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external premium storage attachments for data persistence. While the absence of local disks represents a configuration tradeoff, the server's high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation provide excellent resource isolation. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high RAM-to-vCPU ratio and strong memory bandwidth make it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads without paying for unnecessary local storage.

The E64ns_v6 is optimized for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database deployments, and caching layers like Redis. It is also well-suited for medium-scale LLM inference tasks, as evidenced by its strong prompt processing speeds, and high-throughput static web serving.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6-family virtual machine designed for memory-intensive workloads. It features 64 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 32 physical cores and a 260 MB L3 cache. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks show top-tier uncached read memory bandwidth of 378.82 GB/sec and strong database performance, with Redis SET operations reaching 76.16 million operations per second. The instance lacks local storage, requiring external premium storage. This server is highly suited for large databases, in-memory caching layers, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is an Env6-family virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and is optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ns_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and Intel Xeon processors, designed for high-throughput database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high-bandwidth RAM and advanced Intel Xeon processing for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 64 vCPUs and 512 GB RAM providing a 1:8 memory-to-vCPU ratio
Intel Xeon 8573C processor with AVX-512 and AMX instruction support
Top-tier uncached read memory bandwidth of 378.82 GB/sec
Strong Redis performance with 76.16 million SET operations per second
No local storage included, requiring external premium storage attachments
Optimized for large databases, in-memory caches, and enterprise applications
